column1: # Sweep — AGX part4: MLR=0.022 cross-machine + low-end probe + SCALAR_LR=0.030 (2026-04-24)
# CONTEXT: Spark arbiter confirmed MATRIX_LR=0.022 beats our locked 0.042 by 0.022 BPB (N=3).
# mlr_fine_scan confirmed curve is monotonically decreasing — lower MLR uniformly better.
# AGX part3 confirmed same direction: 0.040 > 0.042 on AGX.
#   (a) Does MLR=0.022 also win on AGX? (cross-machine validation, N=2)
#   (b) Does the curve keep dropping below 0.022? Probe MLR=0.018.
#   (c) Does SCALAR_LR=0.030 win on AGX as it did on Spark (Arm B, N=3)?
# Config identical to part3 (1100 iters, same flags).
